overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a luxury penthouse apartment with distinctive red neon lighting. The player character walks through the modern living space, past bar areas and lounge furniture, eventually reaching an elevator at the end of the unit.

events.description: passes through doorway from dark corridor into red-lit apartment interior

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance doorway into the apartment, approaching the main living area

entered.detail: metal door frame with green accent lighting marking the entrance
continuous red neon light strips running along ceiling edges
glass barrier overlooking lower level with bottles visible behind
dark counter with illuminated bottles and glassware

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the entrance doorway of a luxury apartment, transitioning from a dark corridor into a space illuminated by distinctive red neon ceiling strips. The camera moves forward past a glass railing revealing a bar area below, establishing the cyberpunk aesthetic of the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: main living area with bar and entertainment displays

events.description: moves deeper into the red neon-lit main room, passing illuminated band posters

agents.ego_description: walking through the main living space, observing the bar area and wall decorations

entered.detail: large illuminated poster featuring red demonic face with SAMURAI text
vertical poster with CHIPPIN' IN text and stylized character art
dark wooden bar with glassware and bottles arranged on shelves
tall modern floor lamp with rectangular light panel

segments.scene_description: Exploring the main living area, the camera passes by illuminated band posters including a prominent Samurai poster and Chippin' In artwork. The space features a bar counter with glass shelving and modern floor lighting, all bathed in the signature red neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge area with seating and coffee table

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area, examining the seating arrangement and coffee table items

entered.detail: two large silver metallic bean bag chairs on red carpet
low rectangular table with various items including ashtray and electronic devices
modern white leather sectional sofa with tufted design
multiple suspended screens displaying video content

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a comfortable lounge area featuring silver bean bag chairs and a low coffee table cluttered with items. A white modern sectional sofa sits to the right while multiple TV screens hang suspended in the background, maintaining the red neon ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: back hallway with guitar display and elevator access

events.description: moves from open lounge into narrower back hallway with different lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the apartment, passing the guitar display wall and approaching the elevator

entered.detail: recessed wall display with three electric guitars mounted and illuminated
dark metal elevator doors with green accent lighting above
yellow and black caution tape blocking off a side area
tall green plant in white geometric planter

segments.scene_description: Moving into a narrower back hallway, the camera passes a wall display of three electric guitars and yellow police tape blocking a side area. The space transitions to more subdued lighting as it approaches the elevator doors at the end of the corridor.

events.description: enters the elevator as doors close, beginning descent

agents.ego_description: stepping into the elevator and waiting as it descends to the lobby

entered.detail: digital touch panel displaying floor selection with down arrow indicators
metal bench seating along the elevator wall
dark brushed metal interior walls with overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows entry into the elevator, with dark metal walls and a digital control panel displaying the descent to the lobby. The doors close, transitioning from the apartment hallway to the confined elevator space with artificial overhead lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dark entrance into the heart of a luxury cyberpunk penthouse bathed in red neon light. It begins by crossing the threshold of a doorway, transitioning from a dim corridor into a vibrant interior where red ceiling strips illuminate a glass railing overlooking a lower bar area. As the camera pushes forward into the main living space, the view shifts past glowing band posters and a sleek bar counter with glass shelving. The scene then expands into a comfortable lounge area, gliding past silver bean bag chairs and a cluttered coffee table before passing a white sectional sofa and suspended TV screens that maintain the pervasive red ambient glow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a detailed residential hallway into the confined, industrial space of an elevator. It begins by moving into a narrower back corridor, passing a wall display of three electric guitars and yellow police tape blocking a side area. As the camera advances, the vibrant atmosphere of the apartment fades into more subdued lighting while approaching the elevator doors at the end of the hall. The scene then shifts as the camera enters the lift, moving from the open corridor into a space defined by dark metal walls and a digital control panel. Finally, the doors close, completing the transition from the luxury living space to the artificial overhead lighting of the descending elevator.
